siteVocabulary.description: Agreed-upon terminology for site elements and components

layoutElements.section: Main content areas of the page (Hero Section, Lab Section, Articles Section)
layoutElements.grid: Layout pattern for organizing multiple items in rows/columns
layoutElements.column: Vertical content divisions in multi-column layouts
layoutElements.row: Horizontal content divisions in grid layouts
layoutElements.container: Wrapper element that constrains content width
layoutElements.wrapper: Element that wraps and groups related content

contentContainers.card: Content container with defined boundaries, shadows, and padding
contentContainers.projectCard: Specific card type for displaying project information

interactiveElements.button: Clickable element that triggers an action
interactiveElements.primaryButton: Main action button with primary styling
interactiveElements.secondaryButton: Secondary action button with secondary styling
interactiveElements.tertiaryButton: Tertiary action button with minimal styling
interactiveElements.toggle: Element that switches between two states
interactiveElements.link: Clickable text that navigates to another location

navigationElements.navigation: System for moving between different parts of the site

overlayElements.modal: Overlay dialog that appears above the main content
overlayElements.popup: Small overlay that appears on hover or click
overlayElements.tooltip: Small informational text that appears on hover

contentTypes.article: Written content piece with title, body, and metadata
contentTypes.track: Audio file with metadata (title, artist, duration)
contentTypes.video: Video content with controls and metadata

formElements.form: Collection of input elements for data entry

stateIndicators.loading: Visual indication that content is being fetched
stateIndicators.error: Visual indication that something went wrong
stateIndicators.success: Visual indication that an action completed successfully
stateIndicators.empty: Visual indication that no content is available
stateIndicators.disabled: Visual indication that an element is not interactive

responsiveElements.breakpoint: Screen size threshold for responsive design changes

designSystem.typography: Text styles, fonts, and text hierarchy
designSystem.borders: Border styles and border radius values

utilityElements.preloader: Loading screen shown before main content
utilityElements.badge: Small indicator for status or category

accessibilityElements.skipLink: Link that allows keyboard users to skip to main content

usageNotes.general: Use these exact terms when discussing site elements
usageNotes.consistency: Maintain consistent terminology across all documentation and conversations
usageNotes.clarity: These terms are chosen for clarity and simplicity
usageNotes.avoid: Avoid using alternative terms or descriptions for these elements
